I was unable to set the reminder directly using the cron tool. It seems there was an issue with the provided parameters.

As a fallback, you can set this reminder manually in your Apple Reminders app. Please open Reminders, create a new reminder, set the title to "Take vitamins", and set the due date for tomorrow, March 4th, 2026, at 8:00 AM ET.
